title: MetaBlooms Decision Log Schema
description: Append-only authoritative record of all decisions that affect build, wiring, validation, or shipping.

timestamp_utc.description: UTC timestamp when the decision was finalized.

authority.description: Who has final authority over this decision.

scope.description: System scope affected by this decision.

artifact_targets.description: IDs or names of artifacts impacted.

action.description: Concrete action authorized by the decision.

decision_text.description: Literal decision as stated. No interpretation, no compression.

constraints.description: Explicit constraints imposed by the decision.

effects.description: Expected mechanical effects (files created, paths wired, checks enforced).

reversibility.description: Whether this decision may be undone in the future.

recorded_by.description: Mechanism that recorded the decision (not who made it).

notes.description: Optional clarifying notes. Must not reinterpret decision_text.
